tasks.title: Unified credential record schema + credential_store_set extensions
tasks.notes: Added allowedMembers + expiresAt to CredentialMeta, SessionEntry, PersistentRecord. credentialSet() accepts allowedMembers (default '*') and ttl_seconds. credential_store_set schema extended with members and ttl_seconds params.

tasks.title: Enforcement core — scoping + TTL in credential-store.ts
tasks.notes: credentialResolve() updated: accepts callingMember, returns { denied } or { expired } (purges on expiry). '*' callingMember bypasses scoping. Added purgeExpiredCredentials().

tasks.title: Wiring call sites + startup sweep + credential_store_list display
tasks.notes: All 6 call sites threaded with callingMember. credential_store_list shows members+expiry columns. index.ts calls purgeExpiredCredentials() at startup. T2a+T2b committed together due to TypeScript build dependency.

tasks.title: Credential scoping + TTL test coverage
tasks.notes: 17 new tests in tests/credential-scoping-ttl.test.ts covering scoping allow/deny/bypass, TTL future/past/reset/none, list metadata, purge, backward compat, execute_command integration.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1
tasks.notes: npm run build: exit 0. npm test: 956 passed, 7 skipped, 0 failed (58 test files). Pushed to origin sprint/session-lifecycle-oob-fix.

tasks.title: Per-label credential files + scope_url + forward-slash path fix
tasks.notes: Added label+scope_url params to schema, OsCommands, all 3 providers. Credential files: ~/.fleet-git-credential-<label>. scopeUrl used as gitconfig key. Windows forward-slash fix via -replace. Legacy migration removes old unnamed files. callingMember preserved.

tasks.title: revoke_vcs_auth by label + tests
tasks.notes: Added label param to revokeVcsAuthSchema, defaults to provider name. 7 new tests: multi-label deploy isolation, selective revoke, backward compat, cross-provider coexistence, label-specific revoke.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2
tasks.notes: npm run build: exit 0. npm test: 963 passed, 7 skipped, 0 failed (58 test files). Multi-label coexistence verified: two labels produce distinct credential files and gitconfig entries.

tasks.title: Add unattended field to Agent type + register/update_member
Wire unattended to providers + deprecate dangerously_skip_permissions
tasks.notes: Provider auto-mode flags: Claude --permission-mode auto, Codex --ask-for-approval auto-edit, Gemini/Copilot not supported (config-file only)
